description: A landscape showing a dramatic sunset with intense golden-yellow and orange sky behind blue mountain silhouettes. A large bare tree with dark spreading branches frames the left side. A winding path with a wooden fence runs through a green hillside in the foreground. Below, a calm body of water reflects the warm sky. The distant mountains are deep blue-purple. The sky transitions from golden near the horizon to soft pink and lavender above. A ship's masts are barely visible at the lower left.
